channel.title: bookmark on errbufferoverfl
channel.description: Recent content in bookmark on errbufferoverfl
channel.copyright: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

item.title: Flask Documentation
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Comprehensive guide to Flask, that includes common patterns, how Flask works, and how to get started with common components, like SQL Lite.

item.title: Python Patterns
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Brandon Rhodes, evolving guide to design patterns in the Python programming language. The site allows him to collect his ideas about Python and Design Patterns all in one place.

item.title: Refactoring Guru
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Provides high-level and implementation guides for common design patterns and refactoring.

item.title: Gold Mafia - Episode 1 - The Laundry Service
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Undercover reporters pose as gangsters with up to a billion dollars of black money that need to be cleaned. They gain remarkable access to members of Africa’s Gold Mafia and film closed door meetings with crime bosses.

item.title: Tracking database changes in Flask Sqlalchemy for audit logs
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: If you ever come across a situation where you need to track the changes in the database for auditing purposes or to make the history of all changes in the database.

item.title: OAuth 2.0 Dynamic Client Registration Protocol
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: This specification defines mechanisms for dynamically registering OAuth 2.0 clients with authorization servers. Registration requests send a set of desired client metadata values to the authorization server.

item.title: Police are not primarily crime fighters, according to the data
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: A new report adds to a growing line of research showing that police departments don’t solve serious or violent crimes with any regularity, and in fact, spend very little time on crime control, in contrast to popular narratives.

item.title: Archive Stories
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Archive Stories is a website about how to work with creative and non-traditional archives. We wanted to create a space for conversations about archiving beyond institutional archives, to think through the possibilities that open up when we imagine the archive as expansive and as encompassing everything around us.
